item.title: _handle_sprint_success leaves git on feature branch when mark_complete fails
item.intent: Sprint loop must return to base branch after any failure in _handle_sprint_success so subsequent sprints branch from the correct base
steps: In _handle_sprint_success, when mark_complete fails (the else branch at line ~2386), switch back to the base branch before returning 0
Also clear AISHORE_FEATURE_BRANCH and delete the abandoned feature branch to avoid cleanup_exit confusion
Add a log_warning stating the feature branch was abandoned due to archival failure
Verify subsequent sprint iterations create branches off the correct base branch even after an archival failure
acceptanceCriteria: When mark_complete fails, the working directory is on base_branch after _handle_sprint_success returns
AISHORE_FEATURE_BRANCH is cleared so cleanup_exit does not attempt to delete it again
